[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HydrationDiagnostic](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnostic/index.html)

## HydrationDiagnostic interface

Pluggable formatter for hydration mismatch errors. The default implementation is a minimal one-line message; install [hydrationDebugger()](../fast-element.hydrationdebugger/) to swap in the rich "Expected … / Received …" formatter with an HTML snippet of the SSR DOM.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface HydrationDiagnostic
```

</td><td>

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[formatStructuralError(node, hostName, expectedDescription)](../fast-element.hydrationdiagnostic.formatstructuralerror/)


</td><td>

Format a structural error encountered during the SSR DOM walk (e.g. attribute binding count overflow, missing close marker).


</td></tr>
